allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); simple=[e for e in d if e['type']=='simple']; print\('Total:', len\(d\)\); print\('Simple:', len\(simple\)\); print\('Familles simple:', {e['family'] for e in simple}\); [print\(f\\"  {e['id']}: {e['family']}/{e['valence']}/{e['gender']}\\"\) for e in simple]")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('@tabler/icons-angular'\); const keys = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => /book|arrow|x$|close/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,30\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); types={}; [types.update\({e['type']: types.get\(e['type'],0\)+1}\) for e in data]; print\(types\)")
